hypothesis: Incorporating explicit pairwise interaction edge features, derived from a lightweight physics-informed reaction network, into the GraphSAGE-based mixture model will improve predictive accuracy and extrapolative generalization for ternary gas mixtures (e.g., Ar/O2/CF4) beyond what node-centered features achieve, and will outperform the two-node GraphSAGE model in predicting wafer-scale etching rates.
